mapper.sql: wi.id, wi.user_id, wi.asset_kind, wi.asset_id, CASE WHEN wi.asset_kind = 'FUND' THEN f.fund_code ELSE sm.stock_code END AS asset_code, CASE WHEN wi.asset_kind = 'FUND' THEN f.fund_name ELSE sm.stock_name END AS asset_name, CASE WHEN wi.asset_kind = 'FUND' THEN f.fund_type ELSE '普通股票' END AS asset_type, CASE WHEN wi.asset_kind = 'STOCK' THEN sm.market ELSE NULL END AS market, wi.create_time
FROM watchlist_item wi LEFT JOIN fund f ON wi.asset_kind = 'FUND' AND f.id = wi.asset_id LEFT JOIN stock_market sm ON wi.asset_kind = 'STOCK' AND sm.id = wi.asset_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO watchlist_item (user_id, asset_kind, asset_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{assetKind}, #{assetId}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = LAST_INSERT_ID(id)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM watchlist_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND asset_kind = #{assetKind} AND asset_id = #{assetId}
mapper.select: SELECT WHERE wi.user_id = #{userId} AND CASE WHEN wi.asset_kind = 'FUND' THEN CONCAT('fund#', f.fund_code) ELSE CONCAT('stock#', sm.stock_code, '#', sm.market) END IN #{identityKey}
